info.title: Go4Ride API
info.description:
Ride-hailing **rider app** API (Phase 0–2). Driver and admin APIs are out of scope for this service.

## Authentication

1. `POST /api/v1/auth/request-otp` — send OTP to phone (`debug_otp` returned when `OTP_DEBUG=true`)
2. `POST /api/v1/auth/verify-otp` — exchange OTP for JWT pair; creates account on first sign-in
3. Click **Authorize** and paste the `access_token` (Bearer, no prefix)
4. `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh` — new token pair using `refresh_token` in body (no header)

## Typical booking flow

1. Reverse geocode (optional) → list ride types → estimate fare
2. `POST /api/v1/rides` with optional `Idempotency-Key` header
3. `WS /api/v1/ws/rides/{ride_id}?token={access_token}` for live updates
4. Cancel, history, repeat, or fetch invoice as needed

## WebSocket

```
WS /api/v1/ws/rides/{ride_id}?token=<access_token>
```

Events are JSON payloads published on ride status changes (mock driver advances stages in dev).

## Response envelope

All `/api/v1` JSON endpoints return:

```json
{ "success": true, "message": "...", "data": { } }
```

Errors use the same shape with `success: false` and `data.code` (plus optional `data.errors` for validation).

`/health` is unwrapped: `{"status": "ok"}`.

get.description: Liveness probe for load balancers and Render.

post.description:
Send an OTP to the given phone. Works for both new and returning riders.

The client should follow up with `POST /auth/verify-otp`. `is_new_user`
tells the UI whether to show an onboarding step (e.g. ask for name) after
verification.
Verify OTP and return JWTs. Creates the rider account if first-time.
Exchange a refresh token for a new JWT pair.
Revoke the refresh token (client should discard both tokens).

get.description: Return the authenticated user's id, phone, name, and role.
Resolve coordinates to a formatted address string.
List active ride types (mini, sedan, bike, xl).

post.description: Get distance, duration, and fare quote for a route.
Book a ride. Optional `Idempotency-Key` header prevents duplicate bookings.

get.description: Paginated ride history for the Bookings screen.

post.description: Return estimate + create payload to re-book a past ride.
Cancel an active ride owned by the current rider.

get.description: Lightweight status poll (prefer WebSocket for live updates).
Full ride details including driver info when assigned.
Receipt / invoice stub for completed rides.

patch.description: Update name, email, or avatar. Changing email resets verification.

get.description: Lifetime ride count, distance, and spend for the rider.
List saved addresses; pass `lat`/`lng` to sort by distance.

post.description: Create a saved address (max 10 per user).

patch.description: Update label, coordinates, or default flag on a saved address.

get.description: Get ride credit balance and currency.

post.description: Apply a promo code and credit the wallet (e.g. seed code `WELCOME5`).

get.description: Get the rider's referral code and reward amount.

post.description: Send a verification code to the rider's email (`debug_code` when in dev).
Verify email and grant one-time wallet credit bonus.

get.description: List saved payment methods (stub metadata only).

post.description: Add card metadata (last4, brand — no PAN storage).

RequestOTPRequest.title: RequestOTPRequest
RequestOTPRequest.description: Single-step OTP request — used for both first-time sign-up and returning login.

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token from `POST /api/v1/auth/verify-otp`. Paste the token only (Swagger adds the Bearer prefix).

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Phone OTP login, JWT refresh, and logout. Use **Authorize** with the `access_token` from verify-otp.

tags.name: profile
tags.description: Rider profile and lifetime ride statistics.

tags.name: insights
tags.description: Weekly and monthly ride analytics for the rider home screen.

tags.name: promo
tags.description: Promo codes, referral rewards, and partner interest (stub).

tags.name: email
tags.description: Email verification and one-time credit bonus.

tags.name: payment-methods
tags.description: Saved card metadata (stub — no PAN storage).

tags.name: rides
tags.description: Fare estimates, booking lifecycle, history, invoices, and repeat ride.

tags.name: websocket
tags.description: Live ride status over WebSocket (not listed below — connect manually).
